result.stdout:
Sucrose.Avro.CodeGen:
  avromagic auto-magically generates C# classes from an Avro Schema Registry.

Usage:
  Sucrose.Avro.CodeGen [options]

Options:
  --schema-path <schema-path>                The schema registry URL or File
                                             Path
  --subject-pattern <subject-pattern>        Regex pattern to determine which
                                             schemas to retrieve
  --output-dir <output-dir>                  Output directory where to output
                                             the generated C# classes
  --namespace-mapping <namespace-mapping>    Map namespace from Producer's to
                                             Consumer's e.g.
                                             com.user:Sucrose.User
  --version                                  Display version information
